sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33427" key="e)lasswte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλασσ-ωτέον</orth>, <sense id="n33427.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must diminish</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg006:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.28</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
